FeatureGrid.title: Redefining Service.
FeatureGrid.subtitle: A full suite of digital tools designed for the modern diner.
FeatureGrid.feature1Desc: Real-time reservation system with instant confirmation and digital concierge support.
FeatureGrid.feature2Desc: Unlock high-fidelity culinary photography and behind-the-scenes gallery previews.
FeatureGrid.feature3Desc: Editorial-grade reviews from Dubai's most seasoned food critics and enthusiasts.
FeatureGrid.feature4Desc: 24/7 dedicated line for our elite members to manage bookings and special requests.

MetricSection.title: Introducing the Curation Pulse.
MetricSection.subtitle: Imagine knowing the atmosphere of a restaurant before you even step inside. Our proprietary 50-point inspection system quantifies luxury, service, and consistency.
MetricSection.metric1Desc: We cross-reference thousands of verified diner reviews to determine the real-time reputation of an establishment.
MetricSection.metric2Desc: Our secret curators visit venues at various times of the week to ensure the quality never dips.

AppDownload.label: Mobile Experience
AppDownload.title: Curate your taste on the go.

al-mahara.name: Al Mahara
al-mahara.description: An underwater dining experience within the Burj Al Arab, featuring world-class seafood curated by Michelin-star chefs.
al-mahara.longDescription: Designed by award-winning architects, the lounge features a seamless flow between indoor opulence and an outdoor terrace that seems to float above the city lights. Every detail, from the hand-blown crystal fixtures to the bespoke velvet furnishings, has been curated to create an atmosphere of effortless luxury.

ossiano.name: Ossiano
ossiano.description: Redefining the molecular landscape of contemporary heritage. A masterclass in sensory storytelling and contemporary mastery.

tresind-studio.name: Tresind Studio
tresind-studio.description: Exploring the vast landscape of Indian culinary art through a high-fidelity molecular lens.

crystal-lounge.name: The Crystal Lounge
crystal-lounge.description: A refined space where architectural elegance meets avant-garde culinary fusion.
crystal-lounge.longDescription: Located in the heart of Downtown Dubai, The Crystal Lounge offers a sensory journey through modern fusion cuisine. The space is a masterpiece of light and glass, providing an intimate setting for those who seek the extraordinary.

al-maha.name: Al-Maha Crystal Lounge
al-maha.description: An avant-garde exploration of Levantine flavors, elevated by panoramic skyline views and architectural precision.
al-maha.longDescription: Designed by award-winning architects, the lounge features a seamless flow between indoor opulence and an outdoor terrace that seems to float above the city lights. Every detail, from the hand-blown crystal fixtures to the bespoke velvet furnishings, has been curated to create an atmosphere of effortless luxury.

deans-cheesecake.name: Dean's Cheesecake
deans-cheesecake.description: Authentic artisan cheesecakes with a modern Dubai twist.
deans-cheesecake.longDescription: Dean's Cheesecake is a tribute to the art of baking. Each cake is handcrafted with precision, using the finest local ingredients to create a taste that is both familiar and revolutionary.

primos-pizza.name: Primo's Pizza & Grill
primos-pizza.description: Traditional Italian wood-fired pizza in the heart of Dubai Marina.
primos-pizza.longDescription: At Primo's, we believe in the simplicity of Italian flavors. Our pizzas are made from century-old recipes, baked in a traditional wood-fired oven for that perfect crust.

tijuana-flare.name: Tijuana Flare
tijuana-flare.description: Vibrant Mexican street food elevated for the sophisticated palate.
tijuana-flare.longDescription: Tijuana Flare brings the soul of Mexican street food to Downtown Dubai. Experience bold spices, fresh ingredients, and a festive atmosphere that captures the essence of Mexico.

zuma.name: Zuma
zuma.description: Sophisticated Japanese izakaya-style dining in a high-fidelity setting.
zuma.longDescription: Zuma Dubai offers a unique Japanese dining experience, blending traditional techniques with modern presentation. Located in the heart of DIFC, it is a staple of Dubai's luxury dining scene.

nobu-dubai.name: Nobu Dubai
nobu-dubai.description: Cutting-edge Japanese cuisine blended with Peruvian influences.
nobu-dubai.longDescription: Nobu Dubai at Atlantis The Palm is a world-renowned destination. Experience Chef Nobu Matsuhisa's legendary fusion of Japanese and Peruvian flavors in a stunning setting.

atmosphereHighlights.tableDesc: Hand-crafted ceramic dinnerware and linen settings tailored for this specific venue.
atmosphereHighlights.vybeDesc: A curated acoustic landscape blending deep house with traditional Levantine instrumentation.

scallop.name: Saffron Crystal Scallop
scallop.desc: Hand-dived scallops with a high-clarity saffron infusion.

lamb.name: Levantine Lamb Rack
lamb.desc: 12-hour slow braise with a pomegranate glaze.

baklava.name: The Gold Leaf Baklava
baklava.desc: 24k gold leaf accent with pistachio cream.

gregoire-berger.name: Chef Gregoire Berger
gregoire-berger.quote: Ocean-inspired narratives served within an underwater sanctuary.

himanshu-saini.name: Chef Himanshu Saini
himanshu-saini.quote: Reinventing Indian heritage through a lens of modern molecular gastronomy.

alessandro-rossi.name: Chef Alessandro Rossi
alessandro-rossi.quote: The beauty of food is in the precision of its craft.

mohamad-orfali.name: Chef Mohamad Orfali
mohamad-orfali.quote: A journey of flavors that bridge cultures.
